name: AnyDesign
description_en: Analyze images, websites, and Figma files to extract their design and generate a design.md with a token system, component inventory, and reconstruction notes.
description_zh: 分析图片、网站与 Figma 文件以提炼其设计,生成含令牌系统、组件清单与复刻说明的 design.md。
long_en: Works on full surfaces or single elements (navbar, illustration), emitting token-grounded image-model prompts when the element is visual art.
long_zh: 既能处理整页也能处理单个元素(导航栏、插画),当元素是视觉艺术时还会输出基于令牌的图像模型提示词。
sec_note_en: Reads visual sources you provide and writes documentation locally; no changes are made to the source.
sec_note_zh: 读取你提供的视觉来源并在本地生成文档;不会改动来源。
